CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value UInt8, category String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, category) VALUES (1, 1, 'A'), (2, 0, 'B'), (3, 1, 'C'), (4, NULL, 'D');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value != 0;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = 1 AND category = 'A';
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = 1 OR category = 'B';
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE NOT (value = 0);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE (value = 1) XOR (category = 'B');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IN (1, 0);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE category LIKE 'A%';
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = 1 AND id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE category = 'C');
SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value = 1 GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, ref_id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO another_table (id, ref_id) VALUES (1, 1), (2, 2);
SELECT a.*, b.category FROM test_table a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.ref_id WHERE a.value = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE category IN (SELECT category FROM test_table WHERE value = 0);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE category = 'B' AND (value = 1 OR value IS NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id = 1 AND value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = 1 AND (id = 1 OR id = 3);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE (id = 1 AND value = 1) OR (id = 2 AND value = 0);
